feedPosts.author: Sarah Johnson
feedPosts.content: Just learned about a new phishing scam targeting students. Stay alert and verify sender emails before clicking links.

feedPosts.author: Michael Chen
feedPosts.content: My daughter experienced cyberbullying last week. We reported it and the school took immediate action. Don't stay silent.

feedPosts.author: Cyber Safety India
feedPosts.content: New deepfake detection tools released by government. Learn how to identify manipulated content.

feedPosts.author: Tech News Daily
feedPosts.content: Cybercrime rates decreased by 15% this quarter thanks to increased awareness and reporting.

feedPosts.author: Priya Sharma
feedPosts.content: Thank you to this community for helping me report harassment. The authorities responded within 24 hours.

feedPosts.author: National Cyber Cell
feedPosts.content: New online safety guidelines for parents released. Download the complete guide from our website.

chatMessages.text: Hello! I'm Echo, your support companion. How are you feeling today?

complaints.title: Fake Video Circulating
complaints.description: Someone created a deepfake video of me

complaints.title: Received Death Threats
complaints.description: Anonymous user sending violent threats via email

complaints.title: Online Harassment
complaints.description: Group of people spreading false rumors about me

complaints.title: Manipulated Photos
complaints.description: My photos were edited and shared without consent

securityTips: Never share personal information with strangers online
Use strong and unique passwords for each account
Verify identity before accepting friend requests

greeting: Hello! I'm here to listen and support you. How are you feeling?
Hi there! I'm Echo, your safe space companion. What's on your mind?
Welcome! Take a deep breath. I'm here to help. How can I support you today?
support: I understand this must be difficult for you. You're not alone in this.
Thank you for sharing that with me. Your feelings are valid.
It takes courage to speak up. I'm proud of you for reaching out.
resources: Would you like me to connect you with professional help?
I can help you file a report if you're ready. Would that be helpful?
There are trained counselors available 24/7. Would you like their contact information?
emergency: If you're in immediate danger, please call emergency services: 112
Your safety is the priority. Consider reaching out to a trusted adult or authority.
National Cyber Crime Helpline: 1930. They're available to help you right now.
